required_preferences.fact: Reviews payroll and expenses for both businesses on several weekday evenings after dinner, splitting finance tasks between the store and his bookkeeping job

supersedes.fact: Reviews payroll and expenses on Sunday evenings after dinner — never leaves finance tasks for weekdays

required_preferences.fact: Switches to decaf or herbal tea at home before sunrise — no longer drinks strong coffee due to heart risk

supersedes.fact: Prepares strong coffee at home before sunrise — never buys coffee from cafes or chains

required_preferences.fact: Commutes by foot to the neighboring business for bookkeeping work, using the walk as a brief transition between jobs — avoids driving unless carrying heavy paperwork
Watches soccer games with cousins at home — never goes to bars or public venues for matches
Allocates a bedroom rotation schedule for his children and sibling — everyone shares space to ensure temporary comfort for the newcomer
Arranges extra staffing during holidays and evenings — relies more on extended family or hires temporary helpers to cover for child's absence at the store

persona: An immigrant small business owner managing finances for a family-run grocery store
